title: 🔥估值回归定投舒适区
body: 市场处于成本线下的磨底阶段。AHR999跌至0.49，价格($79,067)低于200日定投成本($81,756)3.3%。长期持有筹码出现浮亏，抛压自然衰竭。当前深贴水结构限制了下跌空间，具备低盈亏比特征。中性。场外资金何时入场？
title_en: 🔥 Valuation back in the DCA comfort zone
body_en: The market is grinding out a bottom below cost basis. AHR999 has dropped to 0.49, with price ($79,067) sitting 3.3% below the 200-day DCA cost ($81,756). Long-term holders are now underwater, so selling pressure is naturally drying up. The current deep discount structure caps the downside, presenting a favorable risk/reward setup. Neutral. Question is, when will sidelined capital step in?
